message:
fix(error,sync): small compile/format followups on the error refactor

Two minor fixups that trailed the error-refactor batch:

- `src/error/mod.rs`:
  * Drop the stray trailing blank line between `NothingToDo` and the
    closing brace of the `BeadsError` enum (rustfmt noise).
  * The new upgrade-variant regression test indexed
    `structured.context` directly, but `context` is `Option<Value>`,
    so that would fail to compile. Unwrap it via `.expect("upgrade
    context")` before the `operation` assertion — intent unchanged,
    it just matches the real StructuredError shape.

- `src/sync/mod.rs`:
  Trailing comma after the `BeadsError::internal(...)` argument so
  rustfmt leaves the call untouched on future edits.

No runtime behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
